stem: The 74th Constitutional Amendment Act provides for ________ for a Transitional area between a rural and urban area.

An object is placed at a distance of 40 cm from a convex lens having focal length 20 cm. Which option gives below correctly describes the nature and the relative size of the image formed at the respective order?

A certain number of people are sitting in a row and all are facing north. Exactly one person is sitting between G and K. I is sitting third to the right of J. H is sitting to the immediate right of G. Exactly four persons are sitting between J and L. M is sitting at the second position to the left of K. If it is given that there is no other person sitting in the row, what is the total number of people in the row?
When baking soda is heated it converts into ________, water, and carbon dioxide.

An element X combines with chlorine to form a compound XCl. The element X is placed on the left side of the periodic table. Which of the following statement(s) are correct for element X?
(i) Has one valence electron.
(ii) Is a metal and is solid.
(iii) Is a non-metal and is a gas.
(iv) Has five valence electrons.

Three statements are followed by three conclusions numbered I, II and III. You have to consider these statements to be true, even if they seem to be at variance with commonly known facts. Decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the given statement.
Statements:
Some woods are charcoals.
Some petrol is diesel.
All diesel are fossils.
Conclusions:
(I) Some petrol are charcoals.
(II) Some fossils are petrol.
(III) Some woods are diesel.
options: Only conclusion I and III follows

stem: If (15x − 9)/x + (15y − 9)/y + (15z − 9)/z = 0, then the value of 1/x + 1/y + 1/z is:

Which instrument aids in the detection of the heartbeat?
The value of √74529 is:
Red and Yellow soils can easily be found in parts of ________ and ________.
What is the natural resource from which petrol and diesel are obtained?
The Resistance of a conductor is:
options: The ratio of I and V
The product of I and V
The Difference of V and I
The ratio of V and I

stem: The HCF of the numbers 64, 86, 108 and 260 is:
Five times a number is 65. Find the number.

In which of the following situations will there be no potential difference induced in the coil?
(a) A bar magnet moving towards a stationary coil
(b) A coil moving towards a stationary bar magnet
(c) A coil and a bar magnet moving in the same direction with the same speed
(d) A coil and a bar magnet moving towards each other with the same speed

stem: A boat takes 21 minutes to go 12.6 km upstream. The ratio of the speed of the boat in still water to that of the stream is 7:1. How much total time (in hours) will the boat take to go 43.2 km upstream and 18.48 km downstream?

reason: Requires a Venn diagram of Singers, Dancers, Students and Males to count male students who are neither singers nor dancers.

stem: Which one of the following districts in Western India recorded a temperature of 1.1 degrees Celsius on December 16, 2021?

reason: Requires ray diagrams of a light ray (parallel to principal axis) passing through a lens to identify the correct one.

stem: How many such pairs of letters are there in the word LOVABLE (in both forward and backward direction) which have as many letters between them in the word as there are in the English alphabetical order?
